meta.note: Indicative per-task token estimates sourced from provider tokenization docs (see workload-estimates.md). Real usage varies with prompt design, image resolution, retrieval depth, and agent re-reads.

workloads.label: Process an image
workloads.note: Describe/classify/caption a ~1 MP image (≈765–1,521 tok across providers) plus a short prompt; short answer out.

workloads.label: Process a page of text
workloads.note: Summarize/analyze a ~500-word page (~650 tok) plus a ~150-tok system prompt; short summary out.

workloads.label: Extract data from a PDF page
workloads.note: Digital page text (~650–800) plus an extraction schema (~300); structured JSON out. A scanned page is priced as an image (~1,800 in).

workloads.label: Extract data from an image
workloads.note: Receipt/invoice/form: high-detail image for legibility (~1,500) plus schema prompt (~300); structured JSON out.

workloads.label: RAG pipeline query
workloads.note: System (~300) + query (~50) + 5 retrieved chunks × ~500 tok (~2,500); grounded answer out. Prompt caching can cut repeated context.

workloads.label: Refactor a repo
workloads.note: 1 MB of source ≈ 250k tok in (~4 chars/tok); ~30% rewritten as edits/diffs out. Floor per MB — agentic loops re-read files, often 2–4× the input.
